'''''Amberhawk''''' was [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Personal Luxury Yacht 3000]] which contained artwork. The ''Amberhawk'' was present in the [[Nezni system/Legends|Nezni system]], where the incident between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Hurrim]] took place.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
